_info.purpose: Manual politician_id assignments for legacy speeches (terms 1-18) that the automatic matcher could not resolve.
_info.when_to_add: Run '--phase legacy-match', then open openbundestag-data.legacy_unresolved.csv. Each row is a distinct (electoral_term, last_name, first_name) speaker key that failed. Find the correct politician_id in the politicians table (DuckDB) or MdB-Stammdaten.XML, add an entry here, re-run '--phase legacy-match'.
_info.how_to_find_id: SELECT p.id, p.last_name, p.first_name, pt.electoral_term, pt.faction FROM politicians p JOIN politician_terms pt ON p.id = pt.id WHERE lower(p.last_name) LIKE '%<name>%' ORDER BY pt.electoral_term

fields.electoral_term: Bundestag Wahlperiode (1–18). Must match the value in the speeches table.
fields.speech_last_name: Last name exactly as it appears in the speeches table (copy from legacy_unresolved.csv).
fields.speech_first_name: First name exactly as it appears in the speeches table. Empty string if the XML had no first name.
fields.politician_id: Official 8-digit MdB ID from Stammdaten (politicians.id in DuckDB).
fields.politician_name: Full name from Stammdaten — for human verification only, not used by the code.
fields.reason_unresolved: Why the automatic matcher failed. Copy from legacy_unresolved.csv.
fields.note: What caused the mismatch and how you found the correct ID.

overrides.note: Stammdaten stores her as Bläss-Rafajlovski (hyphenated married name). The XML uses only Bläss.
Same as term 12 — hyphenated surname in Stammdaten.
Same as term 12 — hyphenated surname in Stammdaten.
OCR/transcription typo in the XML: Gerstenmaler instead of Gerstenmaier. Bundestagspräsident 1954–1969.
Term 5 (1965–69) is absent from Stammdaten for Brandt, despite him being SPD leader and MdB. Stammdaten gap. first_name is empty because the XML had no first name for this entry.
Term 7 (1969–72) absent from Stammdaten. Friderichs is listed for terms 5 and 8 only. Was FDP MdB and Federal Economics Minister in term 7. first_name empty because XML had no first name.
Term 7 absent from Stammdaten. Listed for terms 4, 5, 6, and 8. SPD MdB and minister. first_name empty because XML had no first name.
Term 5 absent from Stammdaten. Listed for terms 6, 7, 8. SPD MdB and Housing Minister. first_name empty because the XML referred to him only as 'Lauritzen' (no first name).
Term 12 absent from Stammdaten. Listed from term 13 onwards. Was FDP Economics Minister from 1993, likely also held MdB seat in term 12.
